name: frontendforge-pro
description: FrontendForge Pro — AI-powered frontend builder SaaS

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run worker:dev -w apps/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
